payload.answer: The new memory ('Sam from Goldman has no children') directly contradicts the existing durable memory ('Sam from Goldman has two children'). **No superseded facts are presented as current.** The system must retain both statements as conflicting possibilities until resolved by external verification or user clarification. Ambiguity is preserved to avoid false certainty.
